title: Overview — Burrow Docs
body_excerpt: Burrow is a notarized macOS menu bar application that exposes your Mac SSH daemon over a stable Cloudflare Tunnel. No port forwarding, no dynamic DNS, no configuration files. Paste one API token and Burrow creates a named tunnel, provisions a CNAME record, and starts cloudflared as a managed child process.

title: Installation — Burrow Docs
body_excerpt: Install cloudflared with brew install cloudflared. Create a Cloudflare API token with four required scopes: Account Cloudflare Tunnel Edit, Zone DNS Edit, Zone Zone Read, Account Account Settings Read. Drag Burrow.app to Applications. The first-run wizard creates the tunnel, provisions DNS, and stores the run token in Keychain.

title: Configuration — Burrow Docs
body_excerpt: Burrow Settings has five tabs: General, Cloudflare, Tunnel, DNS, Advanced. Launch at login uses SMAppService. API token stored in Keychain. Tunnel uses cloud-managed mode with cloudflared tunnel run --token. Delete tunnel stops cloudflared, calls DELETE on tunnel API, removes the CNAME record, and clears Keychain.

title: Cloudflare API Reference — Burrow Docs
body_excerpt: All Cloudflare API v4 endpoints Burrow calls. Base URL https api.cloudflare.com client v4. Token verification GET user tokens verify. Create tunnel POST accounts id cfd_tunnel with config_src cloudflare. Set ingress PUT configurations. DNS records POST zones id dns_records with proxied true and ttl 1.

title: Troubleshooting — Burrow Docs
headings: Menu bar icon stays gray or shows red dot
Tunnel does not recover after sleep
Launch at login toggle has no effect
body_excerpt: Read system log with log stream predicate subsystem com.krzemienski.burrow. Red dot means token invalid or revoked. cloudflared not found means binary missing from opt homebrew bin. Run token stale after tunnel deleted outside Burrow. CNAME NXDOMAIN means proxied false. SMAppService fails if app not in Applications.
